title: Copy Item link to slack - make links preview better with task title and description
excerpt: When I copy an item link from Monday and post it in a third party messaging app it would be very helpful if the link preview was already formatted with the item title and description instead of a generic link

posts.author: yonib (Yoni Braslaver)
